html:html.name: Formulario de DISENO para los WF

qry:select.name: qryForm
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT f.oi_form, f.c_form, f.d_form, f.c_file_mode, f.o_scripts_1, f.o_scripts_2, f.o_scripts_3, f.o_scripts_4, f.oi_wf
FROM WRK01_FORMS as f
WHERE f.oi_form = {#SOURCE:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGroups
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT g.oi_form_group, g.c_form_group, g.d_form_group, g.c_mode, g.c_order, g.oi_form, g.c_var_group, g.o_onchange, g.d_param_1, g.d_param_2, g.d_param_3, g.o_text
FROM WRK01_FORM_GROUPS as g
WHERE g.oi_form = {#SOURCE:@oi_form}
ORDER BY c_order ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryFields
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT f.oi_field, f.c_field, f.d_field, f.c_var, f.c_mode, f.e_order, f.d_param_1, f.d_param_2, f.d_param_3, f.oi_form_group, f.c_parent_field, f.c_valor, f.o_onchange, f.o_onvalidate
FROM WRK01_FORM_FIELDS as f
WHERE f.oi_form_group = {#SOURCE:@oi_form_group}
ORDER BY e_order ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryVar
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT g.oi_wf, v.oi_var, v.c_type, v.d_type_fk
FROM WRK01_VARS as v, WRK01_GROUPS as g
JOIN v.oi_var_group INNER g.oi_var_group
WHERE g.oi_wf = {#SOURCE:@oi_wf} AND g.c_var_group || \'.\' || v.c_var = {#SOURCE:@code_var}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryComboOptions
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT vc.c_var_combo, vc.d_var_combo
FROM WRK01_VARS_COMBO as vc
WHERE vc.oi_var = {#SOURCE:@oi_var}
')/ROWS/ROW

xsl:template.name: SCRIPT-INTERFACE
FORM-SCRIPTS
